response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Phonetic match found for AliA's 'Kakurenbo' and DOES's 'Donten', despite the reference JSON lacking lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was used for song identification, but lyrics were 100% manually transcribed due to the 'null' fields in the reference. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions (Line 1 'e' = Line 2 's') to match the high-tempo rock rhythm and prevent cascading delays. Subtitled the visual title card for the second song.

subtitles.original: 歌わない誰かの記憶は
subtitles.english: The memories of someone who doesn't sing...

subtitles.original: 夕陽と共に甦る
subtitles.english: ...revive along with the setting sun.

subtitles.original: 古ぼけた絵本を取り出して
subtitles.english: Taking out an old, worn-out picture book,

subtitles.original: 落書きの中に一つの
subtitles.english: I found a single answer

subtitles.original: 答えを見つけた
subtitles.english: within the scribbles.

subtitles.original: 自分の価値を疑って
subtitles.english: Doubting my own worth,

subtitles.original: どこまでだって落ちていけるの
subtitles.english: how far can I fall?

subtitles.original: どこか遠くに消えてしまいたい
subtitles.english: I want to disappear somewhere far away,

subtitles.original: こんな世界じゃ僕は要らない
subtitles.english: in a world like this I'm not needed.

subtitles.original: カウントダウンは始まっているよ
subtitles.english: The countdown has already begun.

subtitles.original: いっせーのーで声を挙げて
subtitles.english: All together now, raise your voice,

subtitles.original: 聞こえてくるんだ
subtitles.english: and it will be heard.

subtitles.original: 自分の影の長さに気付く
subtitles.english: Noticing the length of my own shadow,

subtitles.original: もうこんな時間だ
subtitles.english: it's already that time.

subtitles.original: 理想が顔を出した
subtitles.english: Ideals showed their face,

subtitles.original: 届きそうで手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: I reached out as if I could touch them.

subtitles.original: 次は僕に付いてきなよ
subtitles.english: Next, come with me,

subtitles.original: どんな暗闇でも
subtitles.english: no matter how dark it gets.

subtitles.original: もう一回、まだだよ
subtitles.english: One more time, not yet,

subtitles.original: 幕は上がりだした
subtitles.english: the curtain has begun to rise.

subtitles.original: もう一回、まだだよ
subtitles.english: One more time, not yet,

subtitles.original: 色付いてくここから
subtitles.english: things will take color from here.

subtitles.original: 十年後の僕らは
subtitles.english: Ten years later, we...

subtitles.original: すれ違いばかりで
subtitles.english: ...keep passing each other by.

subtitles.original: 幻想に思いを馳せては
subtitles.english: Lost in our illusions,

subtitles.original: 戻れないそう思い込んだ
subtitles.english: we're convinced we can't go back.

subtitles.original: くたびれた心に追い打ちを
subtitles.english: Dealing a further blow to a weary heart.

subtitles.original: あの頃と変わらない勇気も
subtitles.english: Even that unchanging courage...

subtitles.original: 何とも思わない
subtitles.english: ...doesn't mean anything anymore.

subtitles.original: 自分を信じ歩いていければ
subtitles.english: If I could believe in myself and keep walking,

subtitles.original: どこまでだって登れるのに
subtitles.english: I could climb anywhere, and yet...

subtitles.original: 葛藤を跨ぐその空白に
subtitles.english: In that void stepping over conflict,

subtitles.original: 大切なもの見落としている
subtitles.english: I'm overlooking what's important.

subtitles.original: 見つけられないと泣き喚く君へ
subtitles.english: To you, crying out that you can't find it.

subtitles.original: いっせーのーで声を挙げて
subtitles.english: All together now, raise your voice,

subtitles.original: 聞こえてくるんだ
subtitles.english: and it will be heard.

subtitles.original: 自分の影の長さに気付く
subtitles.english: Noticing the length of my own shadow,

subtitles.original: もうこんな時間だ
subtitles.english: it's already that time.

subtitles.original: 一緒で駆け抜ける君に
subtitles.english: Even if I was just clinging to you

subtitles.original: くっ付いてただけの僕でも
subtitles.english: as you ran through,

subtitles.original: 君の前を歩けるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I can walk in front of you,

subtitles.original: こんな頼りない僕でも
subtitles.english: even as unreliable as I am.

subtitles.original: 宝箱は埃を被ったまま失くした
subtitles.english: The treasure chest was lost, still covered in dust.

subtitles.original: 鍵はずっと君のポケットの中にあった
subtitles.english: The key was in your pocket all along.

subtitles.original: 散らばってた全てが今一つに重なる
subtitles.english: All the scattered pieces now become one.

subtitles.original: 手を取り始めよう僕たちの物語
subtitles.english: Let's take hands and begin our story.

subtitles.original: 宝箱はいらないと笑ったまま失くした
subtitles.english: Saying I didn't need it, I lost it with a smile.

subtitles.original: 鍵は僕の胸でも今も鳴り出した
subtitles.english: The key has begun to ring in my chest.

subtitles.original: 散らばってた全てが愛おしくて
subtitles.english: Everything that was scattered is so precious,

subtitles.original: 今一つに重なる 歓声はいつも
subtitles.english: now it all overlaps. The cheers are always...

subtitles.original: いっせーのーで声を挙げて
subtitles.english: All together now, raise your voice,

subtitles.original: いっせーのーで声を挙げて
subtitles.english: all together now, raise your voice,

subtitles.original: 聞こえてくるんだ
subtitles.english: and it will be heard.

subtitles.original: 自分の影の長さに気付く
subtitles.english: Noticing the length of my own shadow,

subtitles.original: もうこんな時間だ
subtitles.english: it's already that time.

subtitles.original: 理想が顔を出した
subtitles.english: Ideals showed their face,

subtitles.original: 届きそうで手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: I reached out as if I could touch them.

subtitles.original: 次は僕に付いてきなよ
subtitles.english: Next, come with me,

subtitles.original: どんな暗闇でも
subtitles.english: no matter how dark it gets.

subtitles.original: もう一回、まだだよ
subtitles.english: One more time, not yet,

subtitles.original: 泣きそうな歌声で
subtitles.english: with a voice about to cry.

subtitles.original: もう一回、まだだよ
subtitles.english: One more time, not yet,

subtitles.original: 笑う君が見えた
subtitles.english: I saw you laughing.

subtitles.original: もう一回、まだだよ
subtitles.english: One more time, not yet,

subtitles.original: 幕は上がりだした
subtitles.english: the curtain has begun to rise.

subtitles.original: もう一回、もういいよ
subtitles.english: One more time, it's okay now,

subtitles.original: 色付いてくここから
subtitles.english: things will take color from here.

subtitles.original: 曇天
subtitles.english: [Title: Donten]

subtitles.original: 鉛の空 重く垂れ込み
subtitles.english: The leaden sky hangs low and heavy...
